channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car still parked at junction, 21st April
item.description:
The car has got a bexley penalty notice stuck on the window and has been there for 2 weeks now. The registration is LY63 XJC. The case is marked as close. Is the vehicle due to be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflow bin, 21st April
item.description:
I have complained about this problem many times have received letter from Hackney council regarding this problem but no one is taking serious

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orpen Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building rubble and black bags and overselling bins, 21st April
item.description:
There are dozens of black bags of rubbish and building debris piled behind the odeon cinema and the back of the buildings at the bottom end of the high street where the fire was a few months ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 288, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The car has been parked outside the playground for nearly a month, 21st April
item.description:
The Blue car, registration WN64 XBK has been parked in the same spot for a month or more. At one point it was left on a wheel jack for a week as it was being repaired. It now has a flat tyre and hasn't moved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped fridge, mattress, etc, 21st April
item.description:
There are two places in Green Vale with fly-tipping. A fridge is one. A cluster of items, including a mattress. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Vale, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 21st April
item.description:
Occupiers of 231 Upper Wickham Lane have dumped their old garden furniture, bags of K Rend and assorted rubbish in Kay Street immediately to the rear of their property. There is also a build up of other assorted flytipping in Kay Street including inside the derelict garages themselves. This is causing issues with vermin and access to our garage alongside being an eyesore.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kay Street, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole photographs, 21st April
item.description:
This pothole has been reported, so I am just adding some photographs, which I hope will be helpful. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sunland Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grey plastic sacks dumped, 21st April
item.description:
First noticed last week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blunts Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and fire damage, 21st April
item.description:
Regular fly tipping is taking place of furniture here and fire damage. The fire damage has previously been marked as fixed but the light is still out, the building hasn’t been cleaned and this could do with some attention

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large number of potholes on Leesons Hill, some over 300mm in length, 21st April
item.description:
These potholes have been getting worse since the end of last summer and are getting bigger and covering half of the junction on the St Pauls Wood Hill side of the junction. I have reported this problem more than once to Bromley Council. Here is the last reference No 9232777, dated 02.04.2026. It's on two bus routes the R1 turns right into St Pauls Wood Hill and the R273 goes straight across. This junction was repaired about 5 years ago. There are other junctions on these bus routes with no problems with more buses turning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed and MOT expired car, left on road next to abandoned van (filled with rubbish). Both left for weeks., 21st April
item.description:
Untaxed and mot expired black lexus car MV07UEN left next to another abandoned vehicle (van filled with fly tip waste). Not moved several weeks. on Elwill way near junction with Barnfield wood road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Enormous road damage, 21st April
item.description:
Cars smashing into these

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Summers Lane, Fallow Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Enormous road damage along the entire street, 21st April
item.description:
Holes, dips gravel everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Summers Lane, Fallow Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide canisters full and empty, 21st April
item.description:
We have found 3 empty and at least four full canisters at the Tannsfeld road end of Alexandra Recreation Ground - they are by the waste bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tannsfeld Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle abandoned across driveway, 21st April
item.description:
This vehicle has been here since 7pm last night. Preventing us from getting on and off our driveway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rats, 21st April
item.description:
I have now seen rats on several occasions over the past few weeks in the hedge within the designated wildlife area in Tabard Gardens, along the path adjacent to Tabard Street. This requires control. I suspect the issue is being exacerbated by people feeding pigeons in the area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deceased dog on the beach, 21st April
item.description:
A deceased dog has sadly washed in on the foreshore
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dreadnought Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenants at Number 6 Eaglesfield Road fly tipping by the side of their bins. I live at number 4 and am sick to death of rubbish. This behaviour attracts further dumping of rubbish., 21st April
item.description:
This is an ongoing problem. Get the tenants to clear it and not to keep doing it. I claim my £100 reward for reporting this, as stated in your many posts on Facebook.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eaglesfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Casing of box is exposed, 21st April
item.description:
There is a small black box underneath the seating and the casing has come away to expose whatever is inside
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shooters Hill, Shooters Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 21st April
item.description:
Dumped car no number plates

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
